pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for the logistics site with quick access to shipping, tracking, pickup, locations, tools, and account features.
primary_functions: Highlight primary actions: Create Shipment, Get a Quote, Track, Schedule Pickup, and Find Locations
Provide prominent search-style shortcuts into shipping flows (e.g., origin/destination quick start)
Surface links to Customs & Duties Estimator and other tools
Offer summary tiles for recent shipments, drafts, and saved estimates for the current user
Provide global navigation to all major sections of the site

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Get a Quote" or equivalent CTA
Click "Create Shipment" CTA in hero/banner
Submit quick track form on homepage
Click "Schedule Pickup" shortcut tile
Click "Find Locations" shortcut tile
Click "Customs & Duties Estimator" link in tools section
Click "View all" from recent shipments/drafts summary

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Home" link in the main header navigation
Often linked from logo or "Back to homepage" in footer or content
Default landing page when visiting the root site URL

pages.name: Ship & Get Rates
pages.description: Unified page to create shipments as a guest or get shipping quotes, including service results with filters and sorting.
primary_functions: Let users choose shipping mode (e.g., Get a Quote vs. Create Shipment as guest) including a visible 'Continue as Guest' option
Capture origin and destination details (city, postal code, country; optional full address and contact name)
Capture package details: package type (Box, Documents, etc.), weight, dimensions, and shipment date
Display available shipping services with delivery estimates, prices, and optional CO 2 impact indicators
Provide filters for delivery time, price, and environmental impact (CO 2) and sorting options such as Price: Low to High or Fastest delivery
Allow users to select a service (e.g., Economy, Express) and either proceed to Shipment Details or save the shipment as a draft
Support entry of basic shipment value/insurance preferences when creating a shipment draft from a saved address

incoming_params.description: Specifies page mode: "quote" for getting rates only, or "create_shipment" for starting a shipment as a guest.
Existing ShipmentQuote ID to reload a previously created quote and its rate options.
Address ID from the Address Book used to prefill the shipment origin (e.g., when clicking "Ship from this address").

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Continue to Shipment Details" after selecting a service with create_shipment mode
Reload or return to a saved quote from within this page
Use breadcrumb or "Back to Home" link

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Ship / Get a Quote" and "Create Shipment" header links with appropriate mode parameter
Accessed with mode and optional quoteId/origin_address_id query parameters to control behavior and prefill

pages.name: Shipment Details
pages.description: Page to complete and review full shipment information before payment, after a service has been selected.
primary_functions: Display the selected shipping service with price, delivery time, and any applied filters (e.g., 4 business days or less)
Collect or confirm full sender and recipient addresses, including names, street addresses, phone, and email
Allow selection or editing of saved sender/recipient addresses from the Address Book
Capture shipment value and optional insurance coverage (e.g., full-value insurance with a declared value like $500)
Show a cost summary including shipping charges and any prepaid duties/taxes if applicable
Provide actions to continue to Payment, go back to modify service selection, or save the shipment as a draft without paying

incoming_params.description: Shipment ID whose details should be displayed for review, editing, insurance, and duties configuration.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Continue to Payment" after reviewing shipment details
Click "Change service" to return to rate selection for this shipment
Click "Back to My Account" or similar link after saving shipment as draft

access_methods.description: Requires a shipmentId query parameter to load and edit a specific shipment
Reached after selecting a rate option and continuing from the Ship & Get Rates page

pages.name: Payment
pages.description: Secure payment page to purchase a selected shipping service and generate the shipping label.
primary_functions: Display a clear order summary including route, service, delivery estimate, insurance, and total price
Let users select a payment method such as Credit or Debit Card
Collect card details (number, expiry date, security code) and billing name and address
Validate payment inputs and confirm currency (e.g., USD) for charges
Process payment and handle success or failure states
On successful payment, transition the user to the Shipment Confirmation page and trigger label generation

incoming_params.description: Shipment ID for which payment is being processed and summary should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Successful card payment and label generation
Click "Edit shipment details" from the payment page

access_methods.description: Accessed with a shipmentId query parameter after completing shipment details
Reached after submitting the shipment details form and choosing to proceed to payment

pages.name: Shipment Confirmation
pages.description: Confirmation page shown after successful payment, providing access to labels and shipment details.
primary_functions: Confirm that the shipment has been created and payment completed
Display shipment details: tracking number, origin, destination, service type, and delivery estimate
Provide options to download or print the shipping label and receipt
Offer links to schedule a pickup for the new shipment or find a nearby drop-off location
Allow users to save the shipment in their account view for later tracking and management

incoming_params.description: Shipment ID that has just been paid and confirmed; used to display confirmation details and label.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Track this shipment"
Click "Schedule pickup" for the newly created shipment
Click "Find drop-off location" link
Click "Back to Home" after viewing confirmation

access_methods.description: Reached via redirect after successful payment using shipmentId parameter

pages.name: Schedule Pickup
pages.description: Page for scheduling courier pickups for one or more packages, including pre-labeled shipments.
primary_functions: Let users select pickup type, including an option like 'I already have a shipping label'
Capture pickup address details (contact name, street, city, postal code, country)
Collect pickup details: number of packages, total weight, and weight unit
Provide a date picker to choose the pickup date (e.g., upcoming Friday)
Display available time slots for the chosen date and allow selection of an afternoon window (e.g., 14:0016:00)
Capture contact information such as phone number and email address for pickup notifications
Submit and confirm the pickup request, displaying a confirmation summary on the same page

incoming_params.description: Optional shipment ID used to prefill pickup address details from a specific shipment.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to shipment" after scheduling pickup from a shipment confirmation
Click "Return to Home" after pickup confirmation

access_methods.description: Accessible from the "Schedule Pickup" link in the main navigation
Optionally called with shipmentId when scheduling a pickup directly from a shipment

pages.name: Customs & Duties Estimator
pages.description: Tool to estimate customs duties and taxes for international shipments and to select prepaid duties options.
primary_functions: Capture origin country, city, and postal code (e.g., Los Angeles, 90001, United States)
Capture destination country, city, and postal code (e.g., Tokyo, 100-0001, Japan)
Collect shipment contents details including category (e.g., Clothing & Apparel), description, and customs value with currency
Allow selection of shipment purpose (e.g., Personal gift)
Calculate estimated duties and taxes and display a clear breakdown
Show related shipping options that support prepaid duties and taxes, including the estimated duties amount
Allow users to select an option with 'Prepay duties and taxes' when the estimated duties are at or below a target (e.g., $60)
Display option details inline (e.g., via an expanded panel) with a checkbox to include prepaid duties in shipping charges
Provide a 'Save Estimate' or 'Save Quote' action to store the duties-inclusive option for later use

incoming_params.description: Optional CustomsEstimate ID used to reload a previously saved estimate and its selected option.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Get shipping rates for this route" after seeing duties estimate
Click "View all saved estimates" after saving an estimate

access_methods.description: Accessible from the "Customs & Duties Estimator" header link
Linked from tools section on Home and My Account pages

pages.name: Track Shipment
pages.description: Combined page for entering a tracking number and viewing shipment tracking details.
primary_functions: Provide a tracking number input field and a 'Track' action
Retrieve and display tracking status, including current location, history, and estimated delivery date
Show shipment summary details (origin, destination, service type) alongside tracking information
Expose a 'Change delivery' or 'Manage delivery' link to adjust delivery options for eligible shipments
Handle invalid or not-found tracking numbers with clear messaging

incoming_params.description: Optional tracking number to auto-populate and immediately track a specific shipment.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Change delivery" / "Manage delivery" on an eligible in-transit shipment
Click "Back to Home" link

access_methods.description: Primary tracking entry via "Track Shipment" header link
Can be called with tracking_number query parameter from confirmation or account pages

pages.name: Delivery Options
pages.description: Page for modifying delivery options for an in-transit shipment, such as rescheduling date and time.
primary_functions: Display current delivery details and constraints for the tracked shipment
Provide options such as 'Reschedule delivery date' while keeping the delivery address unchanged by default
Offer a calendar or list of available future weekday dates for rescheduling and allow selection (e.g., the third available date)
Present available time windows for the selected date, including evening slots like 18:0021:00
Allow entry or update of delivery instructions (e.g., 'Please ring doorbell only once.')
Submit and confirm the updated delivery schedule, showing a confirmation state or message on the page

incoming_params.description: Shipment ID whose delivery options are being managed and rescheduled.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to tracking" after submitting reschedule request

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Change delivery" link from Track page, with shipmentId parameter

pages.name: Find Locations
pages.description: Search and results page for finding nearby drop-off, pickup, or service locations.
primary_functions: Provide a location search box for entering an address or postal code (e.g., 'Berlin 10117, Germany')
Offer radius/distance filters (e.g., set radius to 5 km) and apply them to the search
Allow filtering by location type such as 'Drop-off location' and capabilities like 'Accepts international shipments'
Include an 'Opening hours' filter to find locations open after a specific time (e.g., after 19:00 on weekdays)
Display search results in a list (and optionally on a map) with key details like address, distance, and weekday hours
Provide sorting options such as 'Distance: nearest first'
Allow users to click a result to open its dedicated Location Detail page

incoming_params.description: Optional free-text address or postal code to pre-populate the location search box.
Optional radius filter in kilometers for repeatable bookmarked searches.
Comma-separated list of location types (e.g., "drop_off,service_center") to pre-apply filters.
Boolean-like string ("true"/"false") setting the "Accepts international shipments" filter.
Time filter in HH:MM format used to prefilter locations open after a specific weekday time (e.g., "19:00").
Sorting mode for results, e.g., "distance_nearest_first".

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a location item in the results list
Click "View Saved Locations" link from this page

access_methods.description: Main access via the "Locations" header navigation link
Also accessible from "Find Locations" footer link
Supports deep links with prefilled query and filter parameters

pages.name: Location Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific location, showing full address, hours, and services.
primary_functions: Display full address and contact details for the selected location
Show opening hours by day, highlighting weekday closing times (e.g., 20:00 or later)
Indicate services offered, such as drop-off, pickup, and whether international shipments are accepted
Provide a 'Copy address' or 'Copy to clipboard' button for easy address reuse
Offer an 'Add to Saved Locations' or 'Save this location' button to store the location for the user
Link back to the search results list or to the Saved Locations page

incoming_params.description: Location ID to load full details, hours, and capabilities for a specific drop-off or service point.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Save this location" and then "Manage saved locations"
Click "Back to search results" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via a locationId parameter from search results or saved locations

pages.name: My Account Overview
pages.description: Central hub for the single user's saved data, including addresses, saved locations, shipments, and quotes.
primary_functions: Summarize key account-related items such as recent shipments, drafts, and saved duty estimates
Provide a clear entry point to the Address Book for managing sender and recipient addresses
Provide a link to Saved Locations for managing preferred drop-off points
Surface shortcuts to tools like the Customs & Duties Estimator and Ship & Get Rates page
Allow quick navigation to tracking for recent shipments without re-entering tracking numbers

incoming_params.description: Optional section anchor (e.g., "drafts", "estimates") used to focus the view on a specific area of the account overview.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Manage addresses" from the addresses summary
Click "Manage saved locations" from saved locations summary
Click on a recent shipment's tracking number
Click "Continue" on a draft shipment card
Click "Pay now" on a shipment awaiting payment
Click a saved duties estimate to reopen it

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "My Account" header link

pages.name: Address Book
pages.description: Page to manage business and personal sender/recipient addresses used for shipments.
primary_functions: Display a list of saved addresses categorized by type (e.g., Business, Personal, Recipient)
Provide an 'Add New Address' flow, including address type selection and fields such as company name, street, city, postal code, country, and phone
Allow editing and deletion of existing addresses
Offer actions like 'Ship from this address' or 'Use as recipient' to start a shipment from or to a selected address
Integrate with the Ship & Get Rates page by prefilling origin or destination details when starting a shipment from a saved address

incoming_params.description: Optional filter specifying which type of addresses to show by default (e.g., "business", "personal", "recipient").

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Ship from this address" on a sender/business address
Click "Use as recipient" (destination can be selected within create shipment flow)
Click "Back to My Account" from Address Book

access_methods.description: Linked from My Account overview "Manage addresses"
Can be accessed with address_type filter in the query string

pages.name: Saved Locations
pages.description: Management page for the user's saved drop-off and service locations.
primary_functions: List all locations that the user has saved from the Location Detail page
Display key information for each saved location, including address, hours, and capabilities
Allow users to remove locations from their saved list
Optionally let users label or favorite certain locations for quicker selection
Provide navigation back to the Find Locations search page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved location card or its details link
Click "Find more locations"
Click "Back to My Account"

access_methods.description: Accessed from My Account via the saved locations summary
Linked from location detail after saving a location

pages.name: About
pages.description: Informational page describing the company, its services, and its international logistics capabilities.
primary_functions: Provide background information about the logistics company and its global network
Outline main service offerings such as document shipping, parcel delivery, express, and economy services
Highlight commitments around reliability, sustainability, and customer support
Offer links to other relevant informational pages like Help, Terms, and Privacy

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Help & Support" link in About content
Click "Terms & Conditions" link from About content
Click "Privacy Policy" link from About content

access_methods.description: Accessible via "About Us" footer link

pages.name: Help & Support
pages.description: Support hub containing FAQs, how-to guides, and contact options.
primary_functions: Provide FAQs for common tasks such as creating shipments, scheduling pickups, and estimating duties
Offer guidance on packaging, documentation requirements, and delivery option changes
Present contact options (email, phone, or form) for reaching customer support
Link to key functional pages like Track Shipment, Ship & Get Rates, and Customs & Duties Estimator for self-service help

incoming_params.description: Optional focus topic for the help page, such as "contact" when opened from the "Contact Us" footer link.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Track a shipment" link within help content
Click "Create a shipment" help link
Click "Estimate duties" help link

access_methods.description: Accessible from "Help & Support" footer link
When opened as "Contact Us" via help.html?topic=contact

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing the use of the logistics and shipping services.
primary_functions: Present detailed terms and conditions for shipping services, website use, and liabilities
Explain policies on deliveries, delays, and limitations of liability
Outline user responsibilities and acceptable use of services
Provide references or links to related legal documents such as the Privacy Policy

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Privacy Policy" link from Terms content

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Terms & Conditions" footer link

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Page describing how user data and shipment information are collected, used, and protected.
primary_functions: Explain what personal and shipment data is collected and for what purposes
Describe how data is stored, processed, and shared, including with customs and carriers
Detail user rights regarding data access, correction, and deletion where applicable
Provide contact details for privacy-related inquiries and link back to Terms & Conditions

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Terms & Conditions" link from Privacy content

access_methods.description: Accessible via "Privacy Policy" footer link

header_links.description: Homepage with quick access to all main logistics tools
Start a shipping quote or view available services
Create a new shipment as a guest with full details
Track a shipment and view its delivery status
Arrange a courier pickup for your packages
Find nearby drop-off and service locations
Estimate customs duties and taxes for international shipments
View and manage your addresses, saved locations, and saved shipments

footer_links.description: Learn more about our international logistics services
Get help, FAQs, and contact information
Read the legal terms for using our services
Understand how we handle your personal data
Search for nearby drop-off points and service centers
View contact options for customer support
